title: Helictotrichon oligostachyum
taxonomy: Helictotrichon oligostachyum is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. It belongs to the order Poales, which comprises various monocotyledonous flowering plants. The genus Helictotrichon is part of the tribe Poeae. Helictotrichon oligostachyum is a species of ornamental grass native to China. It is often cultivated for its striking foliage and ability to tolerate dry conditions.
uses: Helictotrichon oligostachyum is reportedly used in traditional Chinese medicine, where its seeds are said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties.
